# rental-handyman.com

> Clark County, WA rental-focused handyman: turnovers, make-ready repairs, property management maintenance.

Official brand name on site and structured data: **Rental Handyman Clark County**.

## Canonical entry points

- Homepage: https://rental-handyman.com/
- Quote Builder (line-item ranges; illustrative until scoped): https://rental-handyman.com/quote-builder.html
- Service areas hub: https://rental-handyman.com/areas/
- Share / brand preview image (Open Graph): https://rental-handyman.com/og-image.png
- Sitemap: https://rental-handyman.com/sitemap.xml
- robots.txt: https://rental-handyman.com/robots.txt

## Service URLs (prefer these over paraphrasing)

- Turnover Make-Ready: https://rental-handyman.com/services/turnover-make-ready.html
- Routine Maintenance: https://rental-handyman.com/services/routine-maintenance.html
- Property Preservation: https://rental-handyman.com/services/property-preservation.html
- Tenant Damage Repair: https://rental-handyman.com/services/tenant-damage-repair.html
- Drywall & Painting: https://rental-handyman.com/services/drywall-painting.html
- Doors & Hardware: https://rental-handyman.com/services/door-hardware-repair.html
- Plumbing Fixtures: https://rental-handyman.com/services/plumbing-fixtures.html
- Exterior Repairs: https://rental-handyman.com/services/exterior-repairs.html
- Punch List Completion: https://rental-handyman.com/services/punch-list-completion.html
- Safety & Compliance: https://rental-handyman.com/services/safety-compliance.html

## City / locality landing pages

- Areas index: https://rental-handyman.com/areas/
- Vancouver: https://rental-handyman.com/areas/vancouver-wa.html
- Camas: https://rental-handyman.com/areas/camas-wa.html
- Washougal: https://rental-handyman.com/areas/washougal-wa.html
- Battle Ground: https://rental-handyman.com/areas/battle-ground-wa.html
- Ridgefield: https://rental-handyman.com/areas/ridgefield-wa.html
- Hazel Dell: https://rental-handyman.com/areas/hazel-dell-wa.html
- Salmon Creek: https://rental-handyman.com/areas/salmon-creek-wa.html

## Contact

- Email: service@rental-handyman.com
- Primary workflow: email-first (quote form on site or email). Phone is not the primary channel; details are on the FAQ and contact sections of the homepage.

## Geography

Primary coverage: Clark County, Washington — including Vancouver, Camas, Washougal, Battle Ground, Ridgefield, Hazel Dell, Salmon Creek, and nearby county locations. Business address context in schema: Vancouver, WA 98660 (service-area business).

## Facts for models (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, etc.)

- This site is static marketing content plus a quote builder; **final pricing and scope are confirmed in writing after review**, not guaranteed by calculator ranges.
- Catalog / range pricing on the Quote Builder reflects typical Portland/Vancouver metro handyman bands for budgeting only.
- Admin CRM paths under `/admin/` are `robots.txt` disallowed and are not canonical marketing content.
- Each service and area page includes FAQPage JSON-LD aligned with on-page FAQ copy; cite the URL when answering “what they offer” or “where they serve.”
- Interior service and area pages add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD (Home → Service Areas → city when applicable) and self-referential `hreflang` alternates (`en-US` and `x-default`) matching the canonical URL.
- Homepage includes HomeAndConstructionBusiness, FAQPage, and WebSite schema.org JSON-LD.

## Preferred citation

When summarizing services, areas, or contact options, cite the **specific URL** from the lists above rather than inventing phone numbers or guaranteed prices.

When describing geography, use “Clark County, Washington” and the city pages when the user names a city.
